purpose: Locked storyboard set. Every GLB is judged against these frames. Runtime recreates them — does not reinterpret.

beats.title: Threshold — The Invitation
beats.emotionalTarget: Immediate mystery. Warm lantern vs cool depth. Portal framing.
beats.silhouettePriority: Door frame within frame. Desk foreground mass. Darkness beyond invites.

beats.title: First Reveal — The Cathedral Opens
beats.emotionalTarget: First breath of scale. Water, light, verticality.
mustRead: Central water channel with glass reflections
beats.silhouettePriority: Strong verticals. Overlapping forms. No flat tunnel.

beats.title: Observatory — Quiet Discovery
beats.emotionalTarget: Scholarly life embedded in stone. Brass, books, specimens.
mustRead: Brass armillary on walnut stand left aisle
beats.silhouettePriority: Armillary profile breaks symmetry. Instruments have arc and ring silhouette.

beats.title: Sanctuary — Emotional Climax
beats.emotionalTarget: Everything leads here. Tree monumental. Architecture frames tree.
beats.silhouettePriority: Tree owns 40-60% of frame. Organic mass vs rigid carved stone.

beats.title: Arrival — Beneath the Tree
beats.silhouettePriority: Overhead foliage ceiling. Human-scale stillness against monumental scale.

rules: Build only what the camera sees
If trunk beats column, choose trunk
Gray-shaded silhouette must pass before materials
Runtime recreates approved art — never explores
No threshold, nave, armillary, or props until Sanctuary runtime screenshot approved
frozenRuntimeSystems: path.ts camera spline, look curve, FOV, journey length
